message:
feat(glow): improve file browser symlink handling and custom extensions

- Fix symlink metadata resolution to properly follow targets for size/modified
- Add is_markdown_with_extensions() to support configurable file extensions
- Update is_directory() and is_markdown() to correctly handle symlink targets
- Prevent recursive scan from following symlinks to avoid infinite loops
- Add test for custom extension configuration in BrowserConfig

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
